subject: Automating transaction updates for your clients
body:
Hi,

I came across McLaurin Realty Group and could see your team is active in the Charlotte market. Keeping buyers and sellers updated throughout the transaction process takes a lot of manual effort.

We help real estate teams set up automated status updates so clients always know where things stand, and your agents don't have to send the same update emails over and over.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
